verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Take me to that place Lord Where there's nothing else but me and You Longing for Your presence I know that You're calling me to You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Here I stand And long for Your embrace Nothing else Could ever take Your place

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Come Holy Spirit Fall in this place I need more and more of You Fill me again with the power of Your Spirit Lord I'm crying out for more and more of You
